title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements and expanding our automation capabilities. We fixed licensing issues that could cause service interruptions and enhanced our skills library to provide better automation options for your revenue operations workflows.

entries.headline: Resolved license activation issues that could interrupt service
details: Fixed a problem where license renewals could get stuck in a loop
You'll now see clear warnings 48 hours before your license expires
License status updates happen more reliably without service disruption

entries.headline: Enhanced automation skills library with better organization
details: Improved 98 automation templates for more reliable workflows
Better organized skill categories make it easier to find the right automation
Fixed naming issues that made some automations harder to locate
